prompt: Create a cinematic anthropomorphic character scene inside the back seat of a vintage luxury taxi at dusk, viewed from a centered wide-angle perspective facing the rear bench. On the left sits a glamorous red feathered bird woman with a tall slender body, layered crimson and magenta plumage like a feather dress, wing-like arms, crossed humanlike legs, dark clawed hands, and a dramatic plume crest; her face is intentionally covered by a large opaque square censor block in muted dark red. On the right sits a suave gray fox man with realistic fur, large pointed ears, amber eyes, a sly confident smile, and black clawed hands, wearing a tailored light gray pinstripe three-piece suit with a black shirt, red tie, red pocket square, waistcoat, lapel pin, and polished gangster-era elegance. The two characters sit close together on a dark brown leather bench seat, lightly holding hands between them, with the fox turned toward the bird woman in a flirtatious, amused pose. The taxi interior has curved tan ceiling panels, wooden door trim, chrome handles, rounded side windows, a rear window, small overhead fixtures, and warm amber cabin lighting. Through the windows show a softly blurred evening city street with blue twilight, glowing bokeh streetlights, and reflections on glass. Use high-end 3D animated film rendering, detailed fur and feather texture, realistic leather, warm cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, soft volumetric light, symmetrical composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, no text.
